successCriteria.description: src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts exists and exports LeaveBalance and CreateLeaveBalanceDto
src/modules/balance/balance.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveBalanceRepository and LeaveBalanceRepository
tests/unit/modules/balance/balance.repository.test.ts exists with Jest tests covering all repository methods
LeaveBalanceRepository.create inserts a row and returns the created LeaveBalance with computed remaining_days
LeaveBalanceRepository.findByEmployeeLeaveTypeAndYear returns the correct balance or null

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections; all async errors must be caught and handled.
No reverse dependencies: The balance module must not depend on other application modules (employee, policy, leave, notification).
outOfScope: All other modules (employee, policy, leave, notification)
Integration tests beyond unit tests for repository
